label: Psychic ritual -- summon pit gate
description: Ritual that opens a pit gate on the map, scaled by a combat-point multiplier derived from ritual quality.

combatPointMultiplierFromQualityRange.label: Combat point multiplier from quality range
combatPointMultiplierFromQualityRange.description: Range of multipliers applied to the combat-point budget when opening the pit gate, lerped through by ritual quality.
